item.title: Version 1.2.8
item.description:
• New: exclude folders from scans. Pick a folder in the scan results and Purge will leave it out of future scans. Excluded folders are listed in Settings with their current size, and excluding only ever narrows what Purge looks at.
  • Cleanup history is now viewable in Settings. Each clean opens a detail view showing what was moved to the trash and what was skipped, along with the space freed and the item count.
  • Onboarding now only appears on a fresh install, not after an update. The flow is shorter and its animations respect the reduced motion setting.
  • Telegram media cache detection is now more reliable across different account setups.
  • Selecting items is easier: tapping anywhere on a row now toggles it across more of the app, and the large files action button now reads "Delete Selected".

item.title: Version 1.2.7
item.description:
• Large files list now responds to a tap anywhere on the row, not just the checkbox. Selection state reads correctly for VoiceOver too.
  • Deletion now runs off the main thread, keeping the app responsive during large cleans.
  • Reworked how updates are handled so the update check no longer hangs. Manual "check for updates" now works reliably.

item.title: Version 1.2.6
item.description:
• Telegram media cache is now detected, often tens of gigabytes of auto-downloaded photos and videos
  • Adobe media caches are now found, including the Premiere and After Effects media cache and Camera Raw, not just the small ones
  • Refined the scan list layout
  • Items that can't be safely cleaned no longer appear in scans
